title: Visualizing Linearization as a First-Order Taylor Approximation
description: This flowchart illustrates the conceptual process of linearizing a multivariate function using its first-order Taylor series expansion, highlighting the inputs, mathematical operations, and final output.
relationships: (a, b) is the input point for f and ∇f
∇f(a, b) provides the slope information for the linearization
L(x, y) is constructed using f(a, b) and ∇f(a, b)
L(x, y) represents the equation of the Tangent Plane to f at (a, b)
